triggered_rules.title: Bulk Extension Rename
triggered_rules.description: Detects multiple extension-changing renames, a common impact signal during ransomware encryption.

triggered_rules.title: Mass File Changes in Short Window
triggered_rules.description: Detects bursty file modifications and renames consistent with encryption-for-impact activity.

triggered_rules.title: Suspicious Outbound Connection During File Churn
triggered_rules.description: Detects network egress paired with active file churn, which can indicate payload staging or coordination during ransomware execution.
